CREATE TABLE series(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series);
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE series2(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO series2(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0), (2, 30.0, 40.0);
SELECT covarSampStable(a.x_value, b.y_value) FROM series AS a JOIN series2 AS b ON a.i = b.i;
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE x_value > 0 AND y_value < 10);
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series ORDER BY i DESC) AS sub ORDER BY i ASC);
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE i IN (SELECT i FROM series WHERE y_value > 0));
CREATE TABLE empty_series(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT covarSampStable(x_value, y_value) FROM (SELECT x_value, y_value FROM series WHERE x_value IS NULL OR y_value IS NULL) AS subquery;
